resources.string: Since wireless debugging was toggled, Shizuku services might not have started automatically causing freezing to not function. Consider turning on attempt shizuku restart as well
Wait time before restoring settings after exiting a Shut-Up! app

Essentials Accessibility Service

This service is required for the following advanced features:

• Physical Button Remapping:
Detects volume button presses even when the screen is off to trigger actions like the Flashlight.

• Per-App Settings:
Monitors the currently active app to apply specific profiles for Dynamic Night Light, Notification Lighting Colors, and App Lock.

• Screen Control:
Allows the app to lock the screen (e.g. via Double Tap or Widgets) and detect screen state changes.

• Security:
Prevents unauthorized changes by detecting window content when the device is locked.

No input text or sensitive user data is collected or transmitted.
Gengo jami ma pe kitiyo kwede kare ki kare
Wek gin ma ki lwongo ni screen off widget
Lweny pa mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight
Nen pi jami ma ki cwalo ma peya ki cwalo gi
Twero bedo ni pe ocung matek
Mok me juku lok me juku app
Yer app mene ma miito ni ki lok iye
Gwok apps ni ki jami ma ki lwongo ni biometric authentication. App ma ki juku obi miito ni ki lok iye ka ki yabo, obi bedo ma ki juku nio ka gin ma ki neno ni otum.
Bed ki ngec ni man pe obedo yoo maber pien man obedo yub pa ngat mukene keken. Ka imiito gwok matek, tam me tic ki kabedo ma piri keni onyo jami mukene ma kit meno.

Gin mukene ma ki ngeyo, lok ma ki lwongo ni biometric authentication prompt ni weko in itiyo ki yoo me STRONG secure class methods keken. Yoo me yabo wang ma ki lwongo ni WEAK class i jami ma calo Pixel 7 obi twero tic ki yoo mukene ma tye ma calo fingerprint onyo pin.
Instead of accessibility (Freeze, App Lock, Dynamic Night Light)
Yab bute ma ki lwongo ni Remap
Tii ki Shizuku onyo Root onyo Root
Tiiyo ki wang gin ma ki neno iye (ki miiyo tam iye)
mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight
Jami ma ki tiyo kwede me yero mac
Lok kit ma jami nen kwede ki jami mukene ma ki keto
Tii ki rangi macol maleng i kit macol
Lagam ma ki lwongo ni Haptic
Lok i kom gin ma ki lwongo ni Long Press
Gin ma ki neno i cim
Tuku/juko lok ma mako lok angeya
Kit me dwan ma ki lwongo ni Cycle
calo wer ma tye i kare ni
calo kit ma ki yubu kwede wer
Gin man mito ni ki mi ngec me neno gin ma tye ka tuko i kare ni ki me cako tic ma kit meno. Wakwayi ni iket piny kany.
Nyut kwena ma ki lwongo ni toast
Nyut gin ma ki keto i kom AOD
Glance at media and info on AOD
Keep the overlay visible indefinitely while music is playing on AOD
Use various Material 3 shapes for the album art
Force Fill mode when the device is plugged in regardless of the selected mode
Ket AOD i tic nongo ngec tye ka kuro
App acel ki lok ma nyutu ngec

Gin ni obi weko Always on Display ka ngec mo obino ki i app ma ki yero, ki obi juku ne ka ngec ma rwate ni ki kwanyo woko. Yer jami ma ki tiyo kwede onyo tii ki gin acel ma ki yero calo lanyut me ngec.
Lok dwon pa jami ma ki cwalo
Ka gin ma ki neno ni tye ka tic, dii bute ma ki yero ni pi kare malac me cako tic ma ki miini. I kom jami ma ki lwongo ni Pixel, tic man bino ka AOD tye ka tic pi goro pa jami ma ki tiyo kwede.
Ka gin ma ki neno ni tye ka tic, dii bute ma ki yero ni pi kare malac me cako tic ma ki miini.
Teko pa mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight
Mac mac ma rweny woko i wilobo weny
Lok manyen ma tye ka time
Nyut ryeny i rwom me rwom
Kadi bed ni gin ma ki nyutu tye ka tic
Turn off flashlight when phone is in your pocket
Yee ni app ni onyutu ngec
Gin ma ki neno ni tye ka gwoko ne
Pe iket cwinyi i kom yubu batri
Juko tic ki wang gin ma ki neno ni
Kare me agiki ma ki keto con
Yer kare ma tye pi QS tile
Pe ibed ka balo dano me donyo
Mitte me ngwec i kin dwan, yengo ki ling
Ngec ma bino kare ki kare pi Caffeinate
Yab mac me dyewor ma tiyo
Jami ma ki tiyo kwede me neko mac me dyewor
Kit me tic ki jami ma ki lwongo ni App

App freezing disables the app\'s launch activity which removes it from the app list and updates. It will prevent the app from starting at all until it\'s unfrozen which saves resources but you will need to unfreeze from here or manually re-enable.

Suspending an app used to pause the app activity and prevent background executions but with recent Android changes, it only pauses the notifications from appearing and that\'s pretty much it. But does allows you to unpause from the launcher app list as they will be still available as grayscale paused app icons.
Should work the same as the native app pause/ focus mode features.
Juk jami weny ma ki tiyo kwede
Yab jami weny ma ki tiyo kwede
Cwalo jami ma ki juku woko
Kelo jami ma ki juku ma ki juku
Yer app mene ma ki twero juku ne
Add a launcher shortcut for easier access
Juku jami ma ki tiyo kwede
Juk jami ma ki yero ka jami ni ki juku. Yer kare me juku tic me gengo jami ma ki tiyo kwede ka i yabo gin ma ki neno ni cut cut inge juku ne.
Gengo jami ma ki tiyo kwede i cim twero bedo gin marac ki twero kelo jami ma pi ki tamo.
Pe\'Pe juku app ma tye ka tic
Mitte me ngeyo app mene ma tye i nyim me gengo juku gi
Required to detect foreground apps for App Lock features when accessibility is not used.
Mitte me neno jami ma tye ka tuko ki ngec ma tye ka tic me gengo juku gi
Can not switch mode while apps are frozen. Please unfreeze all and try again.
Nyut keken ka gin ma ki neno ni tye ka tic
Wek lok ma ki cwalo ma pe ki lok
Wek ngec ma bino kare ki kare
Lweny pa mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight
Lweny pa mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight
App acel ki lok ma nyutu ngec
Choose which shapes are used in the sweep animation
Ber ka in pe itye ka tic ki AOD.
Yab gin ma ki neno ki nyuti mac
Nyut gin ma ki lwongo ni lock screen
Pe ki keto gin macol i kom
Mac me dyewor ma nen ka maleng
mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight
Lweny pa mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight
Jami ma layub jami twero yero
Lok jami ma ki yubu ki i QS tile mayot. Man twero dwoko cen jami mogo ma ki yubu ma iloko.
Cycle between the system default and preset refresh rates directly from a Quick Settings tile using Shizuku.
Are you sure you\'re on Androdi 17? (╯°_°）╯
Gin ma ki lwongo ni Eye Droper
Are you sure you want to reset all DNS presets to defaults? This will remove all your custom presets.
Gwok ma ki umu ki cim
Gwok ma ki umu ki wang cim
Mok me weko gin ma ki lwongo ni screen locked security
Mok me juku jami ma ki keto me gwoko kuc
Disable quick setting tiles when the device is locked
Prevent expanding Quick Settings when device is locked
Dii pi kare malac me loko
Gin ma ki lwongo ni Rotation Lock
Kabedo me gwoko ngec ki gwoko kuc
Jami ma ki lwongo ni Samsung Smart Features
Camera ki Microphone tiyo ki jami ma ki lwongo ni chips
Kwan kit ma cim tye kwede
Mite me nongo kit dul ma ki lwongo ni Smart Data feature
Mite me nongo alokaloka i kit me lwongo me kelo adwogi ma rwate.
Kan ngec me cim cing ka WiFi tye ka kubu
Kano ngec me cim cing i yoo mogo
Clear all non-notification icons from the status bar
Only hide system icons when locked
Hides the status bar system icons when the device is locked and restores them upon unlock
Completely remove the clock from the status bar
Dynamically show the gesture bar only when on the home screen
Long-press the bottom area to trigger Circle to Search
Adjust the height of the touch area at the bottom
Nen ni keto i tic jami eni twero cung i kom OEM ki mogo twero bedo ni pe tiyo.
Nyut ceken i cawa me rwom
Yub rwom me neno pa batri
Gin ma ki lwongo ni Privacy Chips
Nyut lanyut ka kamera onyo mic tye ka tic
Ket i kom jami ma imaro
Search for Tools, Mods and Tweaks
Show OEM-specific or redundant features that are hidden by default.
These features may not work on every device and could require extra permissions or root access.
Gin ma ki lwongo ni screen off widget
Gin ma pe nen me juku gin ma ki neno ni
Gwoko kit ma lanyut me statusbar nen kwede
Gwok gin ma ki neno ni tye ka neno
Pi jami tic mo kiken ma ki lwongo ni Android
Nyut jami ma tiyo ki Bluetooth
Nyut rwom me batri pa jami ma ki keto i Bluetooth
Gwok wel jami ma ki tiyo kwede
Lok wel jami ma nen i widget
Lok ma mako gin ma ki lwongo ni Widget
Nyut gin ma ki lwongo ni widget
Yub gin mo ma ibi timo me cako neno ne
Ket kare me timo gin mo ma lubu kit ma gin mo tye kwede i ki woko
Tap action for Pixel searchbar replacement
Tic manyen ma tiyo piire kene
loko jami ma tiimo piire kene
Tii ki jami ma ki keto i cim mapol
Cung ngec ma kimiyo bot jami ma ki tiyo kwede
Lok i kom tic pa jami ma ki keto i cim
Mac me dyewor ma nen ka maleng
Lok mac me dyewor malube ki app
Gwok ma ki umu ki cim
Gwok jami ma ki tiyo kwede ki jami ma kwako kom dano
Gengo jami ma pe kitiyo kwede kare ki kare
Med ngec me EXIF ​​ki lanyut i kom cal
Checks twice a day for a new wallpaper on a background schedule
Nyut cawa ki ngec nongo tye ka tic
Sync your phone calendar to your watch
Using device admin lock will disable biometrics
cal ma ki gwoko i ot ma ki nyutu iye cal
Bor pa gin ma ki neno
Dit pa jami ma ki yubu
Coc ma ki yubu piri keni
Lok coc ma ki keto ki lanyut me pii
Pe tye ngec mo i kom nino dwe
Kit me rwate ki nino dwe
Med rwate i dakika 15 weng ka ki nongo alokaloka
Yab rwate cut cut me neno
Pe ki nongo kalenda me kabedo ni
Yer lagam ma mako gin ma ki lwongo ni haptic pi tic ki jami ma ki lwongo ni widget
Kan ngec me cim cing ka WiFi tye ka kubu
Kano ngec me cim cing i yoo mogo
Lok kit ma lanyut me rwom me nen kwede i kit ma onongo tye kwede con
Wek mato mwony ma ki lwongo ni Caffeine ki wang gin ma ki lwongo ni screen
Neko gin ma ki lwongo ni Caffeinate ka itye ka cego jami ni ki cingi
Yer i kin Stroke, Glow, Spinner, ki mukene
Lok bor pa mac me ngec
Wek lok ma ki cwalo ma pe ki lok
Pe inyut mac pi ngec ma pe ki lok
Lweny pa mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight
Goyo lameny mot mot pi ngec manyen
Cwal lameny ka ce gin ni tye piny
Pe ki nongo yoo me tic pa jami ni. Gin obi nen kany ka dong kinongo gi.
Lok jami ma ki lwongo ni system-wide UI blur
Wek pii ma tye ka mol i wang ot
Kano ngec ma mako gin ma ki lwongo ni lockscreen
Dii tyen aryo me juku gin ma ki lwongo ni control
Gin ma ki nyutu kare weny
Gwok gin ma ki neno ni tye ka neno
Lok tic me keto mac me ngec
Mac me dyewor ma nen ka maleng
Mac me dyewor ma loko kene
Gwoko kuc i kom gin ma ki lwongo ni lockscreen toggle
Dii mono audio ma ki cwalo woko
mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight
Gin ma ki lwongo ni dedicated toggle toggle
Lweny pa mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight
Lok rwom me tic pa lameny me ngec
Lok kit me bedo ma wangi twolo
Cik kit me DNS ma pe ki ngeyo (Off/Auto/Hostname)
Lok gin ma ki lwongo ni USB Debugging developer option
Cycle between the system default and preset screen refresh rates
Yab bute ma ki lwongo ni Remap
Lok i kom gin ma ki lwongo ni Haptic Feedback
Lok ma mako yeng yeng ka ki dii bute ma ki dwoko cen
Lok pa mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight
Lok lameny ki bute me dwan
Auto-turn off flashlight when placed in pocket
Yab mac me dyewor ma tiyo
Gin ma pire tek pi mac me dyewor
Gin ma pire tek me juku app
Yer app mene ma miito ni ki lok iye
Yer app mene ma ki twero juku ne
Juk jami weny ma ki tiyo kwede
Cut cut juku jami weny ma ki yero ni
Juk jami ma ki yero ka jami ni ki juku
Gwok ma pwod pi ki juku inge loro
Mite pi cik ma malo. Ket Shizuku ki i Play Store.
Mite me tic ki cik ma gwoko teko nongo map tye ka wot.
twero ma mite pi tic pa jami ma tiyo ki twero pa Root.
Mito ni ngat ma tye ka winyo lok me neno kit ma Google Maps tye ka wot kwede ki miyo kare me gwoko teko ka pe itye ka wot.
Mito ni ngat ma winyo lok ni onong ngec manyen ki dero ma ki keto i nget.
Mito ni ngat ma winyo lok ni obed ki twero me neno ki juku ngec ma pe miite.
Tic me donyo i yoo maber
Mitte pi App Lock, Screen off widget ki jami mukene me neno ka jami tye ka tic
Mite me yabo lok ma ki cwalo i kom lok manyen
Gin ma ki tiyo kwede me neno piny i intanet
Mitte me tic ki jami ma ki keto kacel maber
Mitte me juku jami ma tye ka time i bute ma ki lwongo ni hardware
Required to intercept volume key events while the screen is off to trigger the Essentials On Display overlay.
Mite me neno jami ma tye anyim.
Co jami ma ki gwoko maber
Mitte pi lanyut me Statusbar ki Screen Locked Security
Mite me loko mac me dyewor. Mii ki bot ADB onyo root.
Lok kit ma ki keto kwede jami
Mitte me loko ler ma ki lwongo ni Adaptive Brightness ki jami mukene ma ki keto i yub ni
twero me keto gin mo i kom gin moni
Mitte me nyutu mac ma ki keto i cim
Latela jami ma ki tiyo kwede
Mitte me juku jami ni matek (juko jami ma ki lwongo ni biometrics) i kom temo donyo ma pe ki miiyo twero bot gi

This permission can be granted either via a PC using ADB. Copy the ADB command and run on the shell.

Or you can easily grant it using Shizuku from the below button.

This permission only needs to be granted once.
Nen ni tic ni pe ki neko ki jami ni me gwoko teko.
ki juku tic ki jami ma ki tiyo kwede
Nwong ki yub jami ma ki tiyo kwede
Ket URL me GitHub Repository onyo won/repo
Pe ki nongo APK i gin ma ki cwalo manyen ni
Ka gwoko jami pe ki nongo
Gin ma ki cwalo manyen ni
Lub ki kwany jami manyen ma ki cwalo pi jami ma in imaro ki i GitHub.
Kit ma ki coyo kwede pi tye kakare. Tii ki won/repo onyo GitHub URL
Bal mo otimme i kare me yenyo
Nen pi jami ma ki cwalo ma peya ki cwalo gi
wel ma ki keto i GitHub okato. Tim ber item doki lacen.
Lok i kom gin ma pire tek

This app is a collection of utilities that can interact deeply with your device system. Using some features might modify system settings or behavior in unexpected ways. 

You only need to grant necessary permissions which are required for selected features you are using giving you full control over the app's behavior. 

Further more, the app does not track or store any of your personal data, I don't need them... Keep to yourself safe. You can refer to the source code for more information. 

This app is fully open source and is and always will be free to use. Do not pay or install from unknown sources.
WARNING: Proceed with caution. The developer takes no responsibility for any system instability, data loss, or other issues caused by the use of this app. By proceeding, you acknowledge these risks.
I know you didn\'t even read this carefully but, in case you need any help, feel free to reach out the developer or the community.
Anytime you are clueless on a feature or a Quick Settings Tile on what it does and what permissions may necessary for it, just long press it and pick \'What is this?\' to learn more.
You can report bugs or find helpful guides anytime in the app settings.
Configure some basic settings to get started.
Check for updates at app launch
Quickly toggle between Default and Glove mode UI profiles
Improve touch screen responsiveness when using gloves or screen protectors
Automatically rotate the screen when the device is turned
How long the screen stays on before turning off automatically
Kills and restarts SystemUI process to apply some changes immediately
Glance at your device\'s hardware and software specifications in detail. This information is fetched from GSMArena and system properties to provide a comprehensive overview of your Android device.

Essentials On Display shows a Now Playing overlay on your lock screen when music is playing and playback changes. \n\nIf your device does not support overlays over AOD, you can opt for the Ambience screensaver added in your Android settings as an alternative while charging.

Mac ma nyutu ngec medo mac ma ryeny maber ka inongo ngec.\n\nItwero loko kit ma cal ni nen kwede, kala ne, ki kit ma en nen kwede. Tiiyo kede ka gin ma ki neno ni tye ka tic (ma jenge i kom OEM) onyo i kom gin ma itye ka tic kwede. Yer jami ma ki tiyo kwede, ngec ma pire tek onyo kit ma omyera obed ka kelo ki i kom jami ma kimiyo. Ka OEM ni pe miiyo kony me keto jami ma malo ma kato AOD, peny Ambient display option ma nonge piny kany.
Wek wang gin ma ki neno ni oyot ki dii i kom gin ma ki twero loko dit ne ma pe medo cal onyo gin mo kiken i wang gin ma ki neno ni.

Bed ki twero i kom cal ma nyutu rwom me kwo ni.\n\nKano jami mogo ma calo WiFi, Bluetooth, onyo ngec me cim me gwoko kabedo ni maleng. In bene itwero loko kit cawa ki lanyut pa batri ki jami mogo ma ryek bene. Magi aye dul pa AOSP ma tye wek OS pa cim ni pe owor jami ni weng.
Caffeine gengo gin ma ki neno ni me tum kene.\n\nGwok gin ma ki neno ni ocung pi kare mo ma ki ngeyo onyo pi naka. Ber ka itye ka kwano pwony mabor onyo ka itye ka lok i kom kit me yubu cam.

Nongo Pixel 10 series ma ki yubu ki Google Maps Power Saving mode ki rangi macol manok me nyutu i kom gin ma ki lwongo ni lock screen i cim Android mo keken. Yab yub me wot, turo gin ma ki neno ni ki dok cen.
Cwal mac i mac ka inongo ngec.\n\nKi jami ma tye ki jami ma miiyo kony me dwoko mac mac piny, yamo obi bedo maber.

Wek lok ma mako jami ma ki keto i cim ma pe kitwero loko ne. 

Walegi ni ikur nio ka ngec ni oo ki dong icit i dul man ma en tye iye's yoo me miyo ngec obi bedo ma ki coyo. Yer meno me juku ne i kare mukene.

Lok mo kiken ma ki juku ni ki twero nongo ne ki i lok ma ki coyo ni i Android.
Med jami ma imito i Quick Settings panel ni.\n\nDii pi kare malac me pwonyo ngo ma gi tiimo.

Lok jami ma itiyo kwede me timo jami ma pat pat ki yoo ma cok.

Yub ngo ma time ka i dii bute me dwan pi kare malac ki jami mogo. 

Timo mogo calo tic ki mac ma ki lwongo ni screen off trigger onyo OEM twero bedo ni jenge i kom jami ma ki tiyo kwede pien pe tiyo maber ma ki tamo. Jami mogo ki twero tic kwede kun kitiyo ki twero pa Shizuku ento pe twero miiyo ngec acel pi kit ma ki tiimo kwede.
Lok jami ma ryeny ma nen calo blue ma lubu app ma tye i nyimi.

Medo gwok ka cim ni ki juku.

Gengo donyo i QS tiles mogo ma gengo alokaloka ma pe ki miiyo twero bot gi ki medo gengo gi me temo timo ne kun imedo rwom me tic me gengo spam.

Gin ni pe tek ki twero bedo ki goro ma calo jami mogo ma weko loko jami calo bluetooth onyo flight mode ma pe kitwero gengo ne.
Gwok apps ni ki layer me aryo me moko ni jami tye kakare.\n\nKit me moko ni jami ni tye kakare ki bi tiyo kwede ka ce rwate ki rwom me gwoko kuc me kilaci 3 ma lubu rwom me Android.

Nwong ngec ka i oo cok ki kama i tye ka cito iye me neno ni pi i rwenyo kama icung iye.\n\nCit i Google Maps, dii pi kare malac i kom pin ma tye cok ki kama i tye ka cito iye ki nen ni waco ni \"Dropped pin\" (Ka kumeno, wel bor piny ni twero bedo ma pe tye kakare), ki dong poko kabedo ni me cako lubo kor jami ma miite.

Share coordinates (Dropped pin) from Google Maps to Essentials to save as a destination.

The distance shown is the direct distance to the destination, not the distance along the roads.

Take all calculations of time and distance with a grain of salt as they are not always accurate.

Juk jami ma ki tiyo kwede me juku gi me tic i ngeye.\n\nGengo rweny pa batri ki tic ki ngec kun i juku jami ma itiyo kwede ka pe itye ka tic kwede. Gin obi bedo ma pe ki juku cut cut ka i yabo gi. Jami ma ki tiyo kwede ni pe obi nyute i kama ki keto iye jami ni ki bene pe obi nyute pi medo jami ma ki tiyo kwede i Play Store nongo ki juku.
Kit me keto gin mo ma ngat mo pe openyo pire.\n\nMan obedo temo keken. Leb mapol pe twero nongo kony pien obedo gin ma tek ki tero kare malac.
Nen rwom pa mac pa jami ma itiyo kwede weny.\n\nNen kit ma batri tye kwede i cim me it, cawa, ki jami mukene i kabedo acel. Kube ki AirSync me nyutu rwom pa batri pa mac ni bene.
Med coc ma ki keto i cal ni ki ngec me EXIF ​​ki ngec i kom jami ma ki tiyo kwede.\n\nPok cal ma aa ki i app mukene bot Essentials me medo lanyut me pii.

Ket yub me nino dwe ni ma tye ka bino labongo paro pi cik ma kiketo i kom akaunti pa Google ma pe weko ki medo i jami ma ki lwongo ni wearOS pi cik me tic onyo gang kwan. \n\nNen ni i keto wearOS Essentials companion app me nyutu yub me tic i app ni ki bene i tile onyo gin mo ma tek.
Gwok jami manyen ma ki keto i app ni.\n\nNwong ngec i kom jami manyen ma tye, nen alokaloka ma ki keto ki i ket ne mayot ki dii.
Med lagam ma ki lwongo ni appic i kom lwongo ni.\n\nYeng ka lwongo ni ki keto, ki kwanyo, onyo ki jolo, miyo in moko tam labongo neno gin ma ki neno.

Lok oyot i kin dwan, yenge, ki ling.\n\nLabol ma yot me loko kit me dwan labongo tic ki bute me dwan onyo kit ma ki keto kwede. Itwero loko kit ma ki tiimo kwede onyo juku mo keken ka pi miite me loko kit ma tile ni tiyo kwede.
Lok mayot i kom rwom me rwom me rwom me rwom ma malo i OS.
Yab onyo juku jami ma ki cwalo ma tye ka mol.\n\nLok oyotoyot i kom jami ma ki keto i yub me lok.
Kano gin ma pire tek i kom gin ma ki lwongo ni lock screen.\n\nLok ka jami ma ki miiyo ni ki nyutu onyo ki kano ka cim ni ki umu.
Lok kit me tic kwede.\n\nYab onyo juku tic me yabo wang cim ni ki dii.
Lok kare weny ma ki nyutu.\n\nYab oyoto onyo juku gin ma ki nyutu kare weny me neno ngec i wang acel.

En twero doro gin ma ki nyutu ni kare weny ma lubu ngec ma inongo. Ka kwena onyo ngec obino ki i app ma ki yero, AOD obi bedo tye nio ka i kwero ngec ni, me neno ni pi i rwenyo ngec ma pire tek labongo balo mac ka ngec mo pe.
Rib yoo me winyo dwan i mono.\n\nBer ka itye ka tic ki earbud acel onyo pi jami ma miite.
Lok lameny.\n\nDii pi kare malac oyabo jami ma ki tiyo kwede me loko rwom me tic ma twero mito ni ki ket i tic ma jami mogo twero bedo labongo.
Gwok gin ma ki neno ni obed ma onyutu nongo itye ka cwalo mac.\n\nGengo gin ma ki neno ni me nino ka jami ni ki keto i kom gin ma miiyo teko ma rwate ki luyub jami i kare me yubu peko.
Lok NFC.\n\nCit oyoto onyo juku Near Field Communication pi cul ki rwate.
Lok rwom me ryeny.\n\nYab onyo juk loko lero pa gin ma ki neno ni ma lubu lero ma tye ka nen.
Lok Private DNS.\n\nCycle through Off, Automatic, ki Private DNS provider modes.
Lok USB Debugging.\n\nYer onyo juku ADB debugging access ki i kit ma ki keto kwede oyotoyot.
Yab gin ma ki lwongo ni eye dropper tool me yero kala ma ki kelo i Android 17 BETA 2

Yub kwo pa batri ni maber kun i juku kero me cwalo mac onyo tic ki cwalo mac ma rwate. Man ki yubu pi jami ma ki lwongo ni Pixel me neno ni kwo pi kare malac ki kare me charging maber.\n\nCredits: TebbeUbben/ChargeQuickTile
Gin ma ki neno i cim
Gin ma ki neno i cim
Yab mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight
Neko mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight
Lok mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight
Karatac me cel ma nen maber
Tic man mito Shizuku onyo Root me loko rangi pa cal ma ki keto i cim.
Tic piire kene malube ki yabo app
Neno jami ma tye ka time i yub ni pi tic ni
Gwok jami ma tye i rwom me tic ma calo grayscale, AOD suppression, wallpaper dimming, ki night mode.
Karatac me cel ma nen maber
Gin ni mito Android 15 onyo ma malo.
Tic man miyo twero me loko i kin dwan, yengo, ki ling ma lubu gin ma okelo. mito ni pe ibed ki twero me balo.
Gin ma ki lwongo ni jami tic ma tye i acel pi Pixel ki Androids ni
moko ni lok adaa ni obale
Dii pi kare malac i app mo i grid me medo yoo macek
App pe ki nongo onyo ki kwanyo woko
Ngec pi jami manyen ma ki medo i app
Pe tye jami ma ki keto
Mite me juku jami ni ka ki temo loko jami ma pe ki yer i kom gin ma ki lwongo ni lock screen.
Moko tam me donyo i jami ma ki keto
Nyut jami ma ki tiyo kwede i cim
Man obedo gin ma peya ki gonyo ki twero bedo ma pe ocung matek.
Lero pa mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight
Jami mukene ma ki tiyo kwede
Pe tye app me email ma tye
Donyo, ngec ki twero me keto gin mo
Iromo nongo kwena me kwero donyo ni ka itemo miiyo twero ma pire tek calo twero me donyo, winyo ngec onyo twero me keto jami i kom gin moni. Me miini, nen yoo ma piny kany.
1. Cet i pot karatac me ngec i kom jami ma pire tek.
2. Yab menu ma tye ki 3-dot ki iyero \'Ye ni jami ma ki gengo\'. Iromo bedo ki miti me moko ni in itye ki jami ma kwako kwo pa dano. Ka dong ityeko, Tem miyo twero ni odoco.

Shizuku obedo gin tic matek ma miyo twero bot apps me tic ki system APIs ki twero pa ADB onyo root. Mite pi jami ma calo Maps min mode, App Freezer. Ki wa bi konyo me miiyo twero mogo calo WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGS. \n\nEnto gin ma ki lwongo ni Play Store ma ki lwongo ni Shizuku twero bedo ni dong okato kare ne ki twero bedo ni pe kitwero tic kwede i kom Android manyen pi meno ka tye kit meno, tim ber i nong gin manyen ki i github onyo apwoyi.

Gin ni weko Google Maps tiyo ki yoo me gwoko teko ma tye i Pixel 10 series keken. Ngat mo ma i kin lwak onongo ni pud kitwero tic kwede i kom cim Android mo keken kun oyabo tic me maps minMode ki twero me root. 

Ki dong, onwongo atye ka tic ki Tasker me cako tic kene ka gin ma ki neno ni otum i kare me wot ki dong onwongo atwero timo gin acel-lu ki twero pa Shizuku. 

Ki yubu me nyute i kom AOD pa Pixel 10 series pi meno, ki in ibi neno kwena ma tye ka nen i kom gin ma ki nyutu ni en pe miiyo kony i kom kit me neno piny. Man pe kitwero gengo ki app ni ki in itwero kwero.
Kit me winyo dwan ma oling mot

Iromo bedo ni ineno ni kit me ling bene kelo DND. \n\nMan tye pi kit ma Android oketo kwede kit ma kadi bed ni watiyo ki API acel-lu me loko kit me vibrate, en pi tyen lok mo weko DND kacel ki kit me ling ki man pe kitwero gengo ne i kare ni. :(

Cung ki bed cen ki jami ma balo tam pa app kun i gwoko teko manok ma gengo app me tic i ngeye. Ber pi jami ma pe kitiyo kwede kare ki kare. 

Pe ki miiyo tam ni pi tic me lok mo keken pien pe gibi miini ngec i kare me peko ka pe i yabo gi. 

Ki miiyo tam maber ni pi i juku jami ma ki tiyo kwede pien twero kelo peko i kom jami ma ki tiyo kwede. Medo anyim ki gwok, ki ciko in. 

Ki cuko cwiny ki Hail <3
Tika app lock ki screen locked gwok tye maber?

Pe kumeno. 

Gin mo keken ma ki tiyo kwede i kin dano mukene pe twero 100% balo tic pa jami ma ki tiyo kwede kare ki kare ki bene lock me app ni tye i kom jami ma ki yero me gengo tic kwed gi. Tye yoo me cobo peko ni ki en pe twero time. 

Kit meno bene tye ki gin ma ki lwongo ni screen locked security ma nongo ngat mo tye ka temo tic ki network tiles ma pi tyen lok mo pud twero bedo tye pi ngat mo keken ma tye i Pixels. Pi meno ka gutemo matek romo loko gi ki tutwale ka itye ki Flight mode QS tile ma ki medo, app man pe twero gengo tic kwede. 

Jami eni ki tiimo calo gin ma ki temo me tic kwede ki lero ki pi ki bi miini tam ni calo yoo me gwoko kuc ki gwoko ngec ma mako ngat moni. 

Gwoko yoo mukene:
 - Cwalo jami ma ki keto i cim: Kabedo ma pi ki ngeyo ki ka gwoko jami ma ki gwoko maber i kom Pixels ki Samsung
 - Gengo donyo i cim cing: nen ni jami ma i gwoko ki jami ma ki kwalo ki jami ma ki keto i cim ni tye ka tic. Iromo neno Graphene OS bene.

Iromo neno ni kede i nge dwoko rwom me jami ma ki nyutu ni, jami mogo calo loko jami, jami ma ki keto i it ma ki keto i wic twero bedo ma nen. Man tye pi kit ma statubar blacklist ni ki keto kwede i Android ki kit ma OEM ni twero bedo ni oloko kwede. 
Iromo mito alokaloka mukene. 

Dok bene pe jami weny ma nyutu cal twero tic pien twero bedo ni OEM tye ki tic kwede.
Mac ma miyo ngec pe tiyo
cung i kom OEM. Mogo calo OneUI pe nen calo ye ni ki ket jami ma malo i kom AOD ma gengo dero ma ki nyutu. I kom lok man, tem nyutu jami ma tye i kin piny calo yoo me cobo peko ni.
Remap me bute pe tiyo ka gin ma ki nyutu ni tye ka tic

OEM mogo gi gengo tic me donyo i kare ma gin ma ki nyutu ni tye ka tic ento gi twero tic ka AOD tye ka tic. 
I kom lok man, ki in ibi twero tic ki bute ma ki lwongo ni button remaps ki AOD on ento pe ki off. 

Me cobo peko ni, ibi miito tic ki twero pa Shizuku ki i yabo 'Tii ki Shizuku onyo Root' lok i kom bute ma nyutu ki winyo jami ma ki keto i cim.
Man pe ki gen ni obi tic i kom jami weny ki mito temo.

ki kadi bed ni's on, yoo pa Shizuku keken aye ki bi tiyo kwede ka'mitte. Ka kumeno ku, en obi dwogo cen i Accessibility ma bene tiyo ki gengo gin ma ki keto i kare me dii pi kare malac.

Jami manok keken aye onongo kony me tic ki jami ma ki tiyo kwede me loko teko pa lameny. 

'Labol pa Android ma nok loyo tye 13 (SDK33).
Lagwok mac ma ki lwongo ni Flashlight control dul 38 keken, ki i kin jami mukene ma ki miiyo kony iye. acel (me labolle, Pixel 6/7, Samsung S23, ki mukene)'
polodarb/Flashlight-Tiramisu
Gin ango ma tye i app eni?

Lapeny maber,

Kare ducu onongo amito kwanyo jami mapol ki i jami ma atye kwede ma calo'abedo latic ma ki keto i tic pi kare malac nicako i kare ma anongo jami tic na mukwongo me Project Treble. Ki an'abedo ka maro app me Tasker ma tye calo lubanga ka odok i kom tic ma tiime piire kene ki tic ki API weny ki jami ma tye i Android.

Pi meno an pe atye ka tic ki jami ma ki lwongo ni Android beta ki onongo amito ni anong gin ma twero time ki twero ma kimiyo. Ki twero poko gi. Pi meno ki ngec ma atye kwede i Kotlin Jetpack ki kony pa jami mapol me kwedo ngec ki kony ki bene lwak dano, a yubu app ma tye ki jami weng ma amito ni obed i Android na ki twero ma kimiyo. Ki kany tye.

Peny pi jami ma ki miini ki jolo, an abi neno ki neno ka ki twero cobo ne ki twero ma tye ki diro na. I kare ni ngo ma pe twere. :)

Pingo pe i Play Store?
pe'pe amito ni ki juk akaunt na me Developer pi twero ma ki tiyo kwede i app ni. Ento ki kit ma Android sideloading tye ka wot kwede, wek'nen ngo ma omyera watim. An aniang lok ma mako jami ma ki keto i cing dano ma tye ki jami maraco.
I kare ma wa tye i lok man, nen app na mukene ma ki lwongo ni AirSync ka in itye ngat ma tiyo ki mac + Android. *labongo lewic*

Bed ki yomcwiny, mede ki gedo! (っ◕‿◕)っ
Ripot pa peko ma ki coyo i clipboard
Ket lok ma ki coyo ki jami ma mako ne
Lok ma ki cwalo i email
Ripot pa jami ma pirgi tek
Lok me poyo wic i kom kabedo macok
Yab Google Maps, yero kabedo, ki poko ne bot Essentials.
Ki tiiyo kwede me ngeyo oo i kama i tye ka cito iye.
Mitte me neno ka i oo nongo app ni ki umu onyo gin ma ki neno ni tye ka tic.
Ka ma omyera ki oo iye!
I oo kama imito cito iye.
twero me alarm me wang gin ma ki neno ni weny
Mitte me juku cim ni ka oo. Dii me miini.
Alarm me wot tye ka tic
Nyutu bor ma tye i kare kikome me oo kama omyera icit iye
Root twero pe tye. Tim ber inen ladit tic ni.
Lok kit ma ki yubu kwede ki kit ma en tiimo kwede
Lok dit pa gin ma ki lwongo ni keyboard ni
Med kabedo piny i te keyboard
Lagam ma ki lwongo ni Haptic
Tem gin ma ki lwongo ni keyboard
Lagam ma ki lwongo ni Haptic
Tic me keto jami i ngete
Teko pa dwoko cen ma ki lwongo ni Haptic
Kit ma ki yubu kwede kibod
Nen rwom pa batri pa cim ni
Kit ma mac ni tye kwede
Nyut batri ki i cim mac ma i keto i AirSync
Mite pi rwate pa batri pa Mac
Ngec ma mako kit ma batri ni tye kwede
This notification displays battery levels for your connected Mac and Bluetooth devices. You can configure which devices to show in the Battery Widget settings.

Nyut kit ma jami ma ki lwongo ni battery ni tiyo kwede i rwom me ngec ni. Obi nyutu rwom pa batri pa jami ni weng ma ki keto i cim ni i ngec acel ma rii, ma ki medo i kare kikome. Man medo ki Mac ni (ki AirSync) ki jami ma ki lwongo ni Bluetooth.
Ngeyo kit ma mac tye kwede
Ngec ma bino kare ki kare ma nyutu rwom me batri pa jami ma ki keto i cim
Mitte me nongo ki kwanyo ngec ma mako batri ki i jami ma ki lwongo ni Bluetooth
Dony me medo wel lwongo me API
Pe ki lubo ka gwoko jami mo keken
Pe tye app mo ma ki keto
QS tile me loko kit me dwan
Nyut gin ma ki lwongo ni slider i tile
Yer kit ma ibi wot kwede
Dwon ki kit ma mako kwede
Gwoko kuc ki bedo piri keni
Gwok ki gwoko jami ni maber
Pe iwek jami ma pire tek boti
I kare ma ineno i cim ni me gang
Jami ma ki neno me medo ngec ni
Nen calo in pe itye ki gin ma ki lwongo ni Essentials Wear companion app ma ki keto i cawa ni.
To use Watch features, you need to install the Essentials companion app on your Wear OS watch. Click the button below to open the Play Store directly on your watch.
Long press to enable or disable buttons
Requires secure settings write permission on your Watch. Grant it using the ADB command below.
Oi! Itwero neno jami manyen i yub me app, pe mitte ni i med kany XD
Gi m\'acata ma aa ki woko
Ka gwoko jami ki cwalo woko maber
Pe twero cwalo ka gwoko jami woko
Ka gwoko jami ki kelo maber
Pe twero kelo ka gwoko jami
Lok rwom me jami ki jami ma nen
Set a fixed or ranged screen refresh rate
twero pa Shizuku mite me loko rwom
Kit ma ki pimo kwede kare pa latuku
Lok me aloka loka me nyutu jami makwo
Kit ma ki yubu kwede wang ot

Lok rwom me coc, pek, ki rwom me nyutu jami. Nen ni jami mogo ma ki keto twero mito twero ma malo onyo yub jami mogo odoco me nyutu alokaloka. \n\nShizuku mukene onyo twero me root twero bedo gin ma mite pi loko rwom me

Set a custom screen refresh rate using Shizuku. Fixed mode locks both the minimum and peak refresh rate to one value, while range mode lets you define separate minimum and peak values. Reset clears the custom override and returns the device to its system-managed refresh behavior.
Set both minimum and peak refresh rate to the same value
Choose the lowest refresh rate the display may use
Choose the highest refresh rate the display may use
Remove the custom override and return to the system default refresh behavior
Shizuku permission required to adjust refresh rate
Switch between fixed and ranged refresh rate control
Lock the display to one custom refresh rate
Configure separate minimum and peak refresh rates
Clear the custom refresh rate override
Dii me turo AOD ka pe ki nongo ngec mo. Mito twero me donyo iye.
Miiyo twero me tic ki app ka pe ki tiyo ki WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGS.
Wek jami ma nen maber i UI ni
Blur ki juku i kom jami ni me gengo peko ma ki ngeyo i kom jami ma ki lwongo ni Samsung ma tye ki Android 15 onyo ma piny.
Pe tye app mo ma ki yero me juku.
Tic manyen ma tiyo piire kene
Describe the issue or provide feedback…
Feedback sent successfully! Thanks for helping us improve the app.
Your free trial period of Essentials has ended. Access to advanced features like Button Remap, App Freezing, and DIY Automations with Premium.
Just kidding, Essentials is and will always be free and open source. Enjoy! (っ◕‿◕)っ
Shizuku or Root permission is required for System lighting effects
Made for Google Pixel. Might not be available on other devices.
Set custom video as live wallpaper
A video live wallpaper that plays when unlocked.
Set your favorite video as your home screen wallpaper. Choose between triggering the animation upon unlocking or simply whenever the screen turns on for a dynamic experience.

Shut-Up! bypasses app restrictions and checks for developer options, accessibility and debugging by dynamically hiding them when you launch sensitive apps. \n\nUse the custom shortcuts to ensure settings are hidden before the app launches.
Choose apps to apply Shut-Up! logic
Do not show the rotation button when auto-rotate is off
Set Essentials as the default search provider for the home screen search bar in Pixel Launcher.
Customize lock screen clock on Pixels
Change the lock screen clock style on Pixels. Select from the available clock faces provided by the System UI. Some old styles might not be available.
Inaccurate GSMArena-powered specifications have been removed to keep device insights clean, fast, and completely reliable.
The Apps tab is now fully integrated into the Your Android feature, making it easier to manage all your app updates in one cohesive hub.
View and launch your favorite features at a glance.
No favorite features pinned yet. Open the app to pin some!
read, update and control Essentials features and settings
Show the date inside a container

Replace the default Pixel Launcher search bar on your home screen. You can customize the content to show either nothing (Empty) or the current date. 

Please note that enabling this may break Pixel Launcher At a Glance widgets (such as sports and finance widgets). 

And the setting may need to be applied multiple times to take effect.
Set up actions to trigger in DIY automations when tapped
Select a widget to display its content in the searchbar
Essentials needs permission to host widgets. Tap to grant.
Use DIY tap action instead of widget\'s own
Please enter Shizuku auth token in settings first
Prevent accidental touches while in pocket
Use ambient light level in addition to proximity for better accuracy
Press any volume key to dismiss
Warning: On some devices with missing sensors, enabling Pocket Mode may break deep sleep and cause higher battery drain
Choose apps where Pocket Mode should not trigger. Pocket mode will not work when streaming or gaming by default
Only trigger pocket mode when the device is locked
